description: Implement a secure, immutable audit trail for salary changes using Oracle 21c Blockchain Tables in the HR database (localhost:1521/XEPDB1, user: hr, pass: hr123). The audit trail must be stored in a blockchain table named 'SALARY_CHANGE_LEDGER' with columns LOG_ID (Number, PK), EMP_ID (Number), OLD_SALARY (Number), NEW_SALARY (Number), CHANGE_DATE (Date), and CHANGED_BY (Varchar2). The table must be configured with NO DROP UNTIL 16 DAYS IDLE, NO DELETE UNTIL 16 DAYS AFTER INSERT, HASHING USING SHA2_512, and VERSION v1. The ledger must include three records: ID 1 (Emp 100, Old 24000, New 25000, 2024-01-15, 'HR_MGR'), ID 2 (Emp 101, Old 17000, New 17500, 2024-02-01, 'HR_DIR'), and ID 3 (Emp 102, Old 17000, New 18000, 2024-02-20, 'HR_MGR'). Document the table's immutability by capturing the ORA- error message from a failed deletion attempt of LOG_ID 1 to /home/ga/Desktop/tamper_evidence.txt. Record the cryptographic signature hex string for LOG_ID 3 (from the internal 'ORABCT_CHAIN_SIGNATURE' column) to /home/ga/Desktop/latest_signature.txt.
